name: nr-assistant
description: MCP server presets for Neble+Rohde agency workflows

nr-agency.name: N+R Agency MCP
nr-agency.description: Query Supabase for Meta Ads performance data, top ads, demographics, and client context. Requires SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY env vars.

notebooklm.name: NotebookLM MCP
notebooklm.description: Query Google NotebookLM notebooks for source-grounded research. Browser automation via Patchright.
